title: My first reaction to a subscriber wanting to meet me - Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a subscriber named Ron requesting to meet him. He says his first reaction would be that the subscriber should treat him (food or weed) since he's busy, and his second reaction is that he'd want to film it as a two-way on-camera conversation with a subscriber, something he's never done before.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Open to it but expects the subscriber to make it worth his time (e.g., treat him to food or weed)
Would want to record it as a two-way on-camera conversation, a format he's never done

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If a subscriber requested to meet him, his first reaction would be to ask them to take him to a place he always wanted to eat at or buy him some weed because he's a busy person.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He would like to have a video conversation with subscribers because he's never had a two-way conversation with someone he hasn't met before.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks the only person who would agree to a two-way conversation with him is his wife, but it would have to be in person, not on Skype.
